name: Responsive shadcn component variants
scope: Refactor project-owned shadcn UI primitives for mobile-first responsive sizing
Use 44px touch targets and 16px input text below 640px while preserving compact desktop controls at the sm breakpoint
Keep responsive sizing and padding primitive-owned without recreating a custom design system
Preserve compatibility for existing Button size and DialogContent usage during the transition

completed: Planning: shadcn config and installed component audit

Implementation: removed stale surface props from consumers and added semantic Progress tone support
Implementation: completed spec and code-quality review loops

notes: This feature follows the shadcn-only direction after custom design-system documentation removal. It is a responsive ergonomics pass over owned source primitives, not a new visual design system. Existing stale surface props were removed from consumers instead of preserving misleading no-op compatibility.
